name: gabo-mcp
description: Personal MCP server for capturing, structuring, and reusing technical knowledge

scripts.dev:local: npm run kill:zombies && NODE_ENV=development tsx src/index.ts
scripts.kill:zombies: echo '🧹 Cleaning up zombie processes...' && pkill -f 'gabo-mcp-server' 2>/dev/null || echo 'No zombies found'
scripts.kill:all: echo '🧹 Cleaning up all MCP processes...' && pkill -f 'gabo-mcp' 2>/dev/null && pkill -f 'tsx src/index.ts' 2>/dev/null || echo 'No processes found'

author: @gabo
